overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a medieval great hall with high vaulted wooden ceilings and ornate chandeliers, rendered in a game engine. Two characters are seated at a long dining table until one stands and departs toward a rear exit, leaving the other studying alone. The atmosphere is dim and atmospheric with cool-toned lighting.

seated at the table wearing blue clothing, facing away from the camera

long wooden table with blue table runner, place settings, and benches
dark stone wall with hanging tapestries and portraits
arched wooden doorway in the back left corner leading to another area

segments.scene_description: A static view of a dimly lit medieval great hall with high vaulted wooden ceilings. Two NPCs sit at a long dining table—one in dark robes with gold details sits closer to the camera, while another in blue sits further down. Ornate chandeliers hang overhead, and stone walls with tapestries line the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval great hall with long dining tables and chandeliers

standing up and walking away from the table toward the back doorway, exiting the scene

segments.scene_description: The scene remains in the same medieval hall, but the character in dark robes stands up and walks toward the rear exit, leaving the frame. The remaining character in blue continues sitting at the table. The camera stays fixed, capturing the now emptier space as the departure completes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static, atmospheric view of a medieval great hall that shifts from a shared moment of companionship to a scene of solitary study. It begins with two figures seated at a long dining table beneath high vaulted wooden ceilings and ornate chandeliers, with one character in dark robes positioned near the foreground and another in blue further away. As the scene unfolds, the character in dark robes stands and walks away toward a rear exit, gradually leaving the frame. The camera remains fixed, allowing the space to open up and feel emptier as the departure completes. Finally, the shot settles on the remaining character in blue, who sits alone amidst the dim lighting and stone walls adorned with tapestries.
